title: Thai Stovetop Delight
description: A simple yet flavorful Thai-inspired dish made with stovetop delight and other readily available ingredients.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Unsalted or salted, whichever you prefer

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the reconstituted Stovetop Delight and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
